goal: Run reviewed AEDT local-cut BRD via optimization loop for the 102-006060501 s19 channel.

candidate_action_policy.note: candidate_actions below are seed examples, not an L2-only allow list. Real runs should provide all reviewed layer/shape candidates or configure an LLM decider to propose them from bounded inventory evidence.

candidate_action_inventory.tdr_port_orientation_evidence: must be confirmed from port map before signoff; candidates are reviewed inventory, not an L2-only policy

anti_pad_shape_layers.hypothesis: TDR low-impedance feature is mapped to the reviewed L1 ball and L1-L4 laser-via pad parasitic region; enlarge the existing L2 plane void from 20mil to 22mil to increase local impedance.
anti_pad_shape_layers.risk: May over-raise the local impedance if the TDR feature maps to a deeper via section instead of the L02 parasitic.
anti_pad_shape_layers.rollback: restore l02_void_r to 20mil or restore the working project checkpoint
